description: Close accountable human evidence, mapping, source-rights and dashboard review gates.

gates.evidence: Both isolated reviewers completed all 1,500 frozen cases and independent proposals cover every case. The proposal contains 104 positive, 794 negative and 602 excluded cases, leaving a 421-case family/label quota gap. The checksum-bound owner packet is blocked_candidate_spectrum; a separately versioned counterpart-expansion cycle is required before split creation.

The official July 2026 CMS HCPCS Level II ZIP was acquired to ignored raw storage and verified as SHA-256 5591fed257e4d2307c1d2dc9c66abc8e346b1f4c076e9e48559799e2de14b70a. A derived adapter must exclude numeric CPT and D-series dental descriptors and preserve licence/provenance evidence.
The current checksum-bound ledger validates 194 approved decisions. CMS/MBS/PBS/HCPCS restrictions remain explicit; Apache-2.0 applies only to project code and metadata.

The commit-bound automated packet covers 44 browser tests and 36 screenshot hashes against commit 591d84a1b5c4dd7d703414562c1fe2082dd7ef32; scoped accountable human review remains pending and automated evidence is not universal WCAG certification.
